package snap.sealedCopy.generic

import me.tbsten.cream.*

/**
 * (Auto generate by @[SealedCopy] annotation of [Result])
 * 
 * Type-preserving Result.copy generated by @SealedCopy.
 * 
 * Updates shared abstract properties and dispatches to each subtype's copy.
 * 
 * # Example: Basic
 * 
 * ```kt
 * val state: Result = /* one of the subtypes */
 * val updated: Result = state.copy()
 * ```
 * 
 * # Example: Override property values
 * 
 * ```kt
 * val state: Result = /* one of the subtypes */
 * val updated: Result = state.copy(property = value)
 * ```
 * 
 * 
 * @see Result
 * @see Result.Failure
 * @see Result.Success
 */
public fun <T : Any?> snap.sealedCopy.generic.Result<T>.copy(
    timestamp: Long = this.timestamp,
): snap.sealedCopy.generic.Result<T> = when (this) {
    is snap.sealedCopy.generic.Result.Failure -> this.copy(timestamp = timestamp)
    is snap.sealedCopy.generic.Result.Success -> this.copy(timestamp = timestamp)
}

package snap.sealedCopy.generic

import me.tbsten.cream.SealedCopy

@SealedCopy
sealed interface Result<T> {
    val timestamp: Long

    data class Success<T>(override val timestamp: Long, val value: T) : Result<T>
    data class Failure<T>(override val timestamp: Long, val error: Throwable) : Result<T>
}
